hero.title: Less clutter. More clarity to decide the next move.
hero.subtitle: Clarium reorganizes your financial routine with a product-grade interface: local-first, direct, elegant and designed to reduce friction in every entry.

showcaseStats.detail: home, add, planning and insights inside one clear product story.
to reach the essential flow without bloated menus and modal overload.
from artificial dashboards when the goal is simply to get organized.

hero.note: Time-saving and friction-reduction estimates are based on comparing Clarium essential flows against overloaded finance apps full of extra steps, panels and secondary fields.

stats.label: less time to register recurring expenses
stats.detail: fewer fields, fewer context switches and fewer menus before the task is done.

stats.label: to reach the core monthly flow
stats.detail: home, add, planning and insights connect without visual labyrinths.

stats.label: focused on personal organization
stats.detail: no artificial dashboard walls when the user just wants control.

problem.title: The difference between an app that looks polished and one that actually removes friction.
problem.description: Clarium does not sell complexity as sophistication. It swaps excess for fast reading, clear context and direct action.
problem.genericTitle: Too much dashboard. Not enough decisions.
problem.genericDescription: A lot of the market still exaggerates cards, charts, modals and steps that exhaust the user before the basics are done.
genericPoints: more clicks for tasks that should take seconds.
too many visual layers fighting for attention.
a corporate-tool tone for a personal problem.
less sense of control even with more things on screen.
problem.clariumTitle: Lean structure, strong hierarchy and visible progress.
problem.clariumDescription: The product is designed to make financial organization feel lighter without sacrificing depth. The result is an interface that feels calm while guiding action hard.

rows.clarium: direct flow in a few steps
balance, income and outcome with clear hierarchy
goal, card and recurrences in one block

problem.footnote: This is not about looking minimal. It is about removing what slows financial organization down and surfacing what moves decisions forward.

features.title: Everything the user needs in front of them. Nothing that gets in the way.
features.description: The app architecture was built for repeated use, not for empty visual spectacle.
features.promoTitle: A lighter finance routine without giving up control.
features.promoDescription: Clarium turns the month into a readable sequence: balance, entries, planning and analytical reading in the same visual language.
promoPoints: custom categories without a tiring setup.
simple insights to adjust the next move.

items.title: Guided entry flow
items.description: Pick the type, fill only what matters and finish without unnecessary friction.

items.title: Readable insights
items.description: Simple comparisons to understand balance, categories and progress without turning into a noisy panel.

items.title: Planning in one layer
items.description: Monthly goal, card cycle and recurring entries sit together to reduce search and context loss.

items.title: Consistent dark-first UI
items.description: Deep surfaces, strong contrast and accents inspired by the app itself.

items.title: pt-BR, en and es
items.description: The landing and the experience are ready for three languages from day one.

items.title: Privacy by principle
items.description: Personal finance organization with a local-first mindset and less dependency on what is unnecessary.

demo.title: The landing visual language now speaks the same language as the app.
demo.description: The screens below follow the direction of the app shots you shared: deep graphite, technical blue, green for positive balance and strong hierarchy.
demo.flowTitle: From monthly overview to entry flow, with no rhythm break.
demo.flowDescription: Each screen solves a real task. The user knows where they are, what to do and what changed in the month without reading an entire dashboard.
flowSteps: home summarizes balance, income, outcome, goal and latest entries.
add keeps the form essential and highlights the right category.
planning gathers goal, card and recurrences in the same context.
insights compares income, spending and progress in instant reading.

overview.title: Home
overview.subtitle: Monthly summary, balance, card cycle and goal without excess.

transactions.title: Insights
transactions.subtitle: Strong comparisons to adjust the month without interpreting complex dashboards.

categories.title: Planning
categories.subtitle: Goal, card and recurrences in one context with objective reading.

settings.title: Add
settings.subtitle: Guided flow for income, expense and fixed entries with only what matters.

demo.footnote: The screens live in /public/screenshots for future replacement with final captures without rebuilding the section.

build.title: Product, design and frontend working toward the same decision: convert and retain.
build.description: The landing was reorganized to sell the APK better and prove the app has real visual and technical criteria.

points.title: Product direction
points.description: The focus moved from disconnected features to a clear buying argument: less friction, more clarity and real organization.

points.title: Visual alignment with the app
points.description: The landing now draws from the same language as the shared screens, with deep surfaces, controlled glow and stronger hierarchy.

points.title: Scroll motion
points.description: Animations now support the narrative with stronger reveals and a showcase tied to scroll movement.

points.title: Foundation ready to grow
points.description: i18n, SEO, environment-driven CTA and reusable components remain intact for future expansion.

tech.title: A stack chosen to support a serious product, not disposable visual experimentation.
tech.description: The implementation is organized for speed, indexing, accessibility and predictable maintenance.

items.title: Next.js App Router
items.description: Locale routes, strong metadata and a modern foundation for a conversion-focused landing.

items.title: TypeScript
items.description: Typing that keeps consistency as new sections and product capabilities are added.

items.title: Tailwind CSS
items.description: A controlled design system without depending on generic UI libraries.

items.title: Framer Motion
items.description: Reveals and scroll motion with reduced-motion respect and no unnecessary jank.

items.title: next-intl
items.description: Real multilingual experience across pt-BR, en and es.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.description: Per-locale metadata, sitemap, robots, Open Graph and Twitter cards already wired.

items.title: Local-first privacy
items.description: Product messaging and configuration both reinforce local data control.

items.title: Modular architecture
items.description: Copy, assets and CTA changes can happen without breaking the structure.

items.title: Multilingual experience
items.description: Language switching is functional across the full landing narrative.

download.title: Download the APK and start organizing the month with an interface that does not slow you down.
download.description: The page is designed to convert above the fold and reinforce download intent at high-intent points. Once the final APK URL is set, the CTA becomes direct download.
download.availability: Android distribution through the official APK. The same link can host future updates.
download.statusReady: APK configured: CTA is in direct download mode.
download.statusWaiting: APK not configured yet: CTA stays in waiting mode without breaking conversion.

points.label: one official installation path that can also host future releases.
one product structure prepared for local and international users.
no unnecessary signup just to understand the product value.

support.title: If Clarium feels like a product worth existing, help keep it alive.
support.description: This app is independent. Every contribution helps fund interface refinement, Android development, testing, new captures and more professional distribution.
impactPoints: more UX iterations without rushing scope cuts.
more time spent on visual polish and performance.
more breathing room to turn an MVP into a memorable product.
support.pixTitle: Voluntary support, fast and with no intermediaries.
support.pixDescription: If the product direction made sense to you, a simple contribution already helps accelerate the next Clarium phase.
support.note: Support is not required to use the project. But support shortens the path between a strong idea and a stronger product.

author.title: Product, design and implementation signed by the person building Clarium.
author.description: {name} leads product vision, experience design and frontend implementation for this landing and the app ecosystem.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions before download.
faq.description: Direct answers about APK, privacy, languages and project evolution.

items.question: How does APK download work?
items.answer: As soon as NEXT_PUBLIC_APK_URL is set with the official URL, the main CTA opens the APK directly.

items.question: Does Clarium require an account?
items.answer: No. The product idea is to reduce friction and prioritize personal organization with a local-first approach.

items.question: Which languages are ready on the landing?
items.answer: pt-BR, English and Spanish, with functional switching in the main interface.

items.question: Will the project keep growing?
items.answer: Yes. The base is prepared for new captures, official APK rollout, copy refinement and app evolution without major rework.

items.question: Is there a real privacy concern in the product?
items.answer: Yes. Product messaging and configuration were designed to reinforce a local-first approach with less unnecessary dependency.

items.question: How can I send feedback or support the project?
items.answer: You can reach out through the author's GitHub or LinkedIn and also support directly through the Pix key shown on the page.

footer.description: Clarium is a financial organization app with a clean visual language, clarity-first decisions and a local-first mindset for real users.
